itemListElement.reviewBody:
I wish I could rate in negative. Extremely rude and ill mannered staff, specially guards. When they cant teach their employees what would they teach to the children.
Would never recommend.

itemReviewed.name: Excelsior American School - DLF Garden Villas,Sector 43

itemListElement.reviewBody: Excelsior American School provides a very safe and cosy environment to all the students. Within the short time that we have had with the school it was a pleasant experience. Teachers are very encouraging as well as supportive and work on overall development of the students, and shape them for better future.

itemReviewed.name: Excelsior American School - DLF Garden Villas,Sector 43

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Our son is in KG and he loves his Excelsior American School and all his teachers.

As Parents we like the fact that classes are small and teachers are friendly. They are always willing to help students. They take time to explain course subjects and are very supportive to students who require extra help.  We are satisfied with the school’s overall focus on Practical Life and covering a global perspective.

We are also very happy and thankful for the incredible amount of effort put in to mitigate the challenges during the lockdown.

Mr.Hersh Kumar, founder of the School genuinely wants to do so much more for the education system and he is an educator with a difference.

School management is always open to address any issue or concern we have and we always get a very satisfactory revert and each one goes to great length in listening and answering.

Wishing all the very best to  Team Excelsior!

itemReviewed.name: Excelsior American School - DLF Garden Villas,Sector 43

itemListElement.reviewBody: My both kids have been the students of Excelsior American school from the very beginning. I have seen the growth of my children over the years and I give full credit to the school and it’s culture for the development of my kids. They are very competitive and have confidence to face the world. My elder son have been selected in Singapore University for his higher studies and the younger one now aspires to study abroad as well. The faculty have been extremely professional and cooperative and give individual attention to all the kids. I would highly recommend the school...

itemReviewed.name: Excelsior American School - DLF Garden Villas,Sector 43

itemListElement.reviewBody: I have been there for the Grand baby show  at christmas carnival event on 22nd December 2018. It was a wonderful experience to be there with my family...A round of applause for the event management staff who have worked sohard to make the event flwaless.. the performance from the children showed the effort of teachers..My kid also enjoued there and we won gifts too at different categories..At last i might consider this institution for my kids education.
